Sell online the items you no longer wear and receive a voucher to use on our new collections, on sandro-paris.com, in store, or on our Sandro Second Hand website. .svg-wrapper-arrow-left-17px-16px { width: 17px; height: 16px; } COMPOSITION & CARE DELIVERY, EXCHANGES & RETURNS .svg-wrapper-arrow-right-17px-16px { width: 17px; height: 16px; } .svg-wrapper-arrow-nav-left-12px-12px { width: 12px; height: 12px; } DELIVERY, EXCHANGES & RETURNS .svg-wrapper-arrow-right-17px-16px { width: 17px; height: 16px; } DELIVERY Delivery is available for Belgium, Luxembourg, Portugal & Austria. Delivery dates may be longer during sales periods. Deliveries are guaranteed within these timeframes for any order placed before noon, from Monday to Friday : STANDARD DELIVERY - FREE Within 3 to 4 working days. DELIVERY TO STORE - FREE Within 3 to 4 working days, to one of our stores in Belgium, Luxembourg & Portugal, excluding corners and outlets. EXCHANGES & RETURNS Online exchange - Free : If an item doesn’t suit you or if you’ve simply changed your mind, you can exchange it directly online within 14 days of receiving your parcel. In-store return - Free : To make a return in-store, go to one of our Sandro boutiques in Belgium, Luxembourg & Portugal (Excluding affiliates, corners and outlets) with your order number and items, within 30 days of receiving your parcel. Return by post - 5,95€ : To make a return by post, you have a period of 14 days from the date of receipt of your order to print out your returns label and return one or more of your items to us. All postal returns are at your expense : 5,95€ will be deducted from your refund. For more information, please refer to our General Terms and Conditions. PAYMENT METHODS Secure payment by credit card (Visa, Mastercard, American Express), Apple Pay, PayPal or Bancontact (Belgium only). Payment in instalments is available with PayPal. .svg-wrapper-arrow-left-17px-16px { width: 17px; height: 16px; } ENVIRONMENTAL CHARACTERISTICS .svg-wrapper-arrow-nav-left-12px-12px { width: 12px; height: 12px; }
